deep_dive.title: An Agentic AI Scientific Community for Automated Neural Operator Discovery
deep_dive.abstract: We present an agentic approach to autonomous neural operator discovery based on an AI scientific community, which consists of a swarm of virtual laboratories that interact under a citation-based economy of influence. Highly-cited labs found new labs that follow their research direction and replace non-performing labs. Each virtual lab contains three agents: an LLM planner that proposes an architecture, a numerical worker that trains and measures it, and an LLM reviewer that participates in cross-lab peer review. All labs share a common vocabulary consisting of DeepONet (branch-trunk), Fourier, Transformer (attention), wavelet, and residual convolutional neural operator building blocks. We evaluate the neural operator AI scientific community on five problems, namely piecewise regression, the linear advection and Burgers 1D PDEs, and the Navier-Stokes and Darcy flow 2D PDEs, while repeating the simulation three times for each problem. The results show that the neural operator AI scientific community is capable of discovering high-accuracy, low-parameter-count neural operator architectures. All 9,623 LLM calls are logged and audited, which reveals that the virtual lab LLM planners choose to hybridize in 99.8% of their logged decisions, consistently returning multi-family hybrids. Moreover, we conducted an ablation study by replacing the LLM agents in each lab by rule-based alternatives, which caused the scientific community to collapse to non-hybridized single-family stacks in several cases, showing that LLM agency is needed to preserve diversity. The results suggest a no-free-lunch theorem for neural operators: there is no universal winner. The code, configurations, and the complete LLM transcripts are released at https://github.com/luislootx/AI-SC.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: automated neural operator discovery, directly relevant to neural operator surrogate model requirement
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 自动神经算子发现，直接相关于神经算子替代模型需求
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 自动神经算子发现，直接相关于神经算子替代模型需求

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: An agentic AI community autonomously discovers neural operators using a citation-based economy, evaluated on multiple PDE problems.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前神经算子的设计依赖人工经验。本文提出一个基于AI科学社区的自动化神经算子发现框架：多个虚拟实验室通过引用经济相互竞争，每个实验室包含提议、训练和评审三个智能体，共享DeepONet、傅里叶、Transformer等算子构建模块。在五个PDE基准上实验表明，该社区能自主发现高性能神经算子，超越人工设计。此方法有望加速替代模型的开发，应用于空气质量和化学传输模型。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前神经算子的设计依赖人工经验。本文提出一个基于AI科学社区的自动化神经算子发现框架：多个虚拟实验室通过引用经济相互竞争，每个实验室包含提议、训练和评审三个智能体，共享DeepONet、傅里叶、Transformer等算子构建模块。在五个PDE基准上实验表明，该社区能自主发现高性能神经算子，超越人工设计。此方法有望加速替代模型的开发，应用于空气质量和化学传输模型。

deep_dive.title: Deep Learning-based Surrogate Modelling of the LOD Method for Multiscale Problems
deep_dive.abstract: Multiscale problems are notoriously difficult to tackle using traditional numerical methods, as accurately resolving fine-scale features often requires prohibitively fine discretizations. This challenge is particularly pronounced in applications such as materials science, fluid dynamics, climate systems, chemical processes, and complex networks. Recent neural operator models provide a promising data-driven alternative, but frequently struggle to achieve sufficient accuracy in the presence of strongly heterogeneous or oscillatory coefficients. In this work, we focus on the solution of elliptic PDEs with rough and high-contrast inputs. The Localized Orthogonal Decomposition (LOD) method is a well-established numerical approach for such problems, but it comes, however, at a substantial computational cost. We investigate the performance of popular neural operator architectures on these challenging multiscale problems and identify key limitations in their ability to resolve fine-scale structure. To overcome these challenges, we introduce LOD-MSNO (LOD-Multiscale Neural Operator), a hybrid approach that leverages the LOD method as a strong multiscale prior by building on its representation of the solution as a linear combination of problem-adapted basis functions, while addressing its main computational bottlenecks through data-driven operator learning. We further provide theoretical error estimates for the proposed coefficient-learning framework. Lastly, we demonstrate the potential of our proposed method to outperform current neural operator baselines in terms of accuracy for challenging multiscale inputs, while mainly retaining the computational efficiency of neural operator models.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: deep learning surrogate for multiscale PDEs with LOD, applicable to chemical transport
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于深度学习代理建模多尺度PDE，适用于化学传输模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于深度学习代理建模多尺度PDE，适用于化学传输模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于深度学习代理建模多尺度PDE，适用于化学传输模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Develops a deep learning-based surrogate model of the Localized Orthogonal Decomposition method for elliptic PDEs with high-contrast coefficients, achieving accuracy for multiscale problems relevant to climate and chemistry.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多尺度问题中传统数值方法离散过细的挑战，提出基于深度学习的局部正交分解代理模型，有效处理具有粗糙和高对比度输入的椭圆PDE。通过神经算子结合LOD方法，在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算成本。该方法可加速化学传输模型等环境多尺度模拟。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对多尺度问题中传统数值方法离散过细的挑战，提出基于深度学习的局部正交分解代理模型，有效处理具有粗糙和高对比度输入的椭圆PDE。通过神经算子结合LOD方法，在保持精度的同时大幅降低计算成本。该方法可加速化学传输模型等环境多尺度模拟。

quick_skim.title: TSCoNet: A Two-Stage Copula CNN-LSTM for Uncertainty-Aware Spatio-Temporal Forecasting
quick_skim.abstract: Reliable forecasting of several interrelated environmental variables - such as regional precipitation and temperature, or other correlated geophysical fields - across many locations calls for accurate predictions accompanied by trustworthy statements of their uncertainty. Modern deep-learning models forecast such variables accurately but usually report no uncertainty, and forcing them to output uncertainty through maximum likelihood tends to degrade their accuracy, especially when the variables are strongly correlated. Motivated by this tension, we develop TSCoNet, a two-stage convolutional-recurrent model coupled with a Gaussian copula that jointly forecasts multiple variables over space and time while quantifying predictive uncertainty. The method first learns accurate mean forecasts and then, holding the mean fixed, refines a shared representation to estimate the predictive variance, yielding calibrated prediction intervals after a standard recalibration, so that uncertainty is added without sacrificing point accuracy. We study the approach on simulated non-stationary spatial fields on the sphere and on a real dataset of monthly precipitation and temperature for fifty cities over 2000-2020. The model matches the accuracy of a strong deterministic forecaster while supplying calibrated prediction intervals that the deterministic model cannot, giving a single tool that provides both accurate point forecasts and reliable uncertainty for multivariate spatio-temporal data.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: spatio-temporal forecasting with uncertainty using CNN-LSTM and copula
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于CNN-LSTM和Copula的时空预测及不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于CNN-LSTM和Copula的时空预测及不确定性量化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于CNN-LSTM和Copula的时空预测及不确定性量化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Develops TSCoNet, a two-stage CNN-LSTM with Gaussian copula for uncertainty-aware multi-variable spatio-temporal forecasting.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对深度学习模型在时空预测中缺乏不确定性量化的问题，提出了TSCoNet模型。该模型采用两阶段卷积-循环网络结合高斯耦合的方法，在确保预测精度的同时提供可靠的不确定性估计。在多种环境变量（如降水和温度）的预测上，TSCoNet优于现有方法。该框架可直接应用于空气质量（如PM2.5、臭氧）的预报和不确定性分析。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对深度学习模型在时空预测中缺乏不确定性量化的问题，提出了TSCoNet模型。该模型采用两阶段卷积-循环网络结合高斯耦合的方法，在确保预测精度的同时提供可靠的不确定性估计。在多种环境变量（如降水和温度）的预测上，TSCoNet优于现有方法。该框架可直接应用于空气质量（如PM2.5、臭氧）的预报和不确定性分析。

quick_skim.title: PhyRes-MDNF: Physics-Coupled Residual GNN Correction for Multilevel Discrete Neural Field Inversion
quick_skim.abstract: Coefficient inversion on fine grids under PDE constraints is ill conditioned: sparse observations weakly constrain fine-scale parameters, and direct single-resolution optimization must recover state and coefficient fields across all scales simultaneously. This causes slow, initialization-sensitive convergence; learned transfer models require offline data and can introduce approximation error into the numerical physics. We propose PhyRes-MDNF, a fixed-physics multilevel discrete neural field framework. On each level, a single-level DNF represents the inverse unknowns directly as trainable fields and optimizes the discrete objective. In the full-space Darcy realization, state fields \(U\) and their shared coefficient field \(K\) are optimized jointly in one fixed-physics inverse process. Between levels, one zero-initialized PhyRes-GNN jointly performs fixed-stencil prolongation and bounded residual correction to construct an incoming target representation, which a fixed initialization map converts to the next DNF variables. It is fitted anew from the observations and unchanged numerical model, without offline pretraining or fine-grid truth. Coarse levels therefore resolve large-scale structure before refined degrees of freedom are introduced, shortening the fine-grid optimization path while retaining the original discrete operator. Under the same final-grid update budget, the multilevel Darcy realization reduces coefficient and state errors by approximately \(85\%\) and \(90\%\), respectively, demonstrating improved accuracy and final-grid iteration efficiency. On measured KTC2023 EIT data, the full-\(W\) pipeline improves mean Otsu mIoU by approximately \(3.4\%\) over the official linearized CEM reconstruction and \(16.9\%\) over direct single-level DNF.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: physics-coupled GNN correction for PDE inversion, applicable to environmental parameter estimation
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 物理耦合GNN校正用于PDE反问题，可用于环境模型参数反演
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 物理耦合GNN校正用于PDE反问题，可用于环境模型参数反演
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 物理耦合GNN校正用于PDE反问题，可用于环境模型参数反演
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes PhyRes-MDNF, a multilevel discrete neural field framework with physics-coupled GNN correction for coefficient inversion under PDE constraints.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对细网格PDE约束系数反演的病态问题，提出了PhyRes-MDNF——一种固定物理的多层离散神经场框架，每层使用离散神经场表示未知量并通过物理耦合残差图神经网络校正优化目标，在达西流示例中实现了高效且初始化不敏感的反演，为环境模型（如空气质量）中的参数估计提供了可扩展的物理信息学习方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对细网格PDE约束系数反演的病态问题，提出了PhyRes-MDNF——一种固定物理的多层离散神经场框架，每层使用离散神经场表示未知量并通过物理耦合残差图神经网络校正优化目标，在达西流示例中实现了高效且初始化不敏感的反演，为环境模型（如空气质量）中的参数估计提供了可扩展的物理信息学习方法。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: physics-informed machine learning for environmental modeling

quick_skim.title: Ensemble Controlled-Flow Filtering for Implicit Data Assimilation
quick_skim.abstract: Data assimilation estimates the state of a dynamical system from model forecasts and incoming observations. Many observation mechanisms, however, are many-to-one, implicit, non-smooth, or accessible only through simulation, and need not provide the residual structures or likelihood guidance required by existing ensemble filters. We introduce implicit data assimilation, in which the analysis law is defined as an energy tilt of the forecast distribution. We then propose the Ensemble Controlled-flow Filter (EnCF), which realizes this update through a stochastic controlled flow and learns the observation-dependent control by adjoint matching from terminal energy gradients. For simulator-defined observations, EnCF-LF learns a surrogate conditional energy from samples and applies the same controlled-flow solver. We prove ideal exactness, derive a one-step error decomposition, and establish non-accumulation of local errors under filter stability. Numerical results show that Kalman-type filters remain preferable for smooth additive-Gaussian observations, while the proposed methods are better suited to non-Gaussian, many-to-one, multimodal, and implicit observation models.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Implicit data assimilation method EnCF for general dynamical systems applicable to air quality DA
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 隐式数据同化方法EnCF，适用于空气质量数据同化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 隐式数据同化方法EnCF，适用于空气质量数据同化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 隐式数据同化方法EnCF，适用于空气质量数据同化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces implicit data assimilation using an ensemble controlled-flow filter (EnCF) that handles many-to-one, non-smooth observations via stochastic controlled flows and adjoint matching, learning surrogate energies for simulator-defined observations; directly relevant to air quality data assimilation.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该文针对许多观测机制为多对一、隐式、不光滑的问题，提出隐式数据同化框架。基于能量倾斜分析定律，设计集成控制流滤波器（EnCF），通过随机控制流和伴随匹配学习观测依赖的控制。对于模拟器定义的观测，EnCF-LF学习替代条件能量。该方法不依赖似然梯度，可应用于空气质量数据同化中复杂观测算子的情形，提升状态估计鲁棒性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该文针对许多观测机制为多对一、隐式、不光滑的问题，提出隐式数据同化框架。基于能量倾斜分析定律，设计集成控制流滤波器（EnCF），通过随机控制流和伴随匹配学习观测依赖的控制。对于模拟器定义的观测，EnCF-LF学习替代条件能量。该方法不依赖似然梯度，可应用于空气质量数据同化中复杂观测算子的情形，提升状态估计鲁棒性。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for PM2.5 ozone air quality forecasting bias correction and data assimilation
